name: AIMailer - Dual Daily AI Roundups
summary: Automated dual daily emails: AI Tooling Roundup (12 PM) and AI Models & Releases (3 PM) for AI developers.
goals: Deliver two complementary daily emails covering AI tools and model releases
Automate fetch → dedupe → summarize → rank → email pipeline for both streams
Prioritise high-signal official releases and dev-focused tooling updates
Prevent duplicate articles with intelligent tracking per email type
primary_features: Dual email system: AI Tooling (12 PM) + AI Models & Releases (3 PM)
Readability-style extraction and LLM summarization (2–3 sentences + why devs care)
Deduping, scoring and selection with source diversity
HTML email composition and automated sending via AWS SQS + SMTP
Separate duplicate prevention tracking for each email type
Multiple recipient support with individual delivery
secondary_features: AWS SQS queuing for reliable email delivery

ai_tooling.name: Daily AI Tooling Roundup
ai_tooling.focus: Developer tools, frameworks, coding assistance, business tooling

ai_models.name: Daily AI Models & Releases
ai_models.focus: New models, releases, coding AI, enterprise features, major updates

tech_stack.cache: JSON file-based article tracking (separate per email type)

security_considerations: API keys and SMTP credentials stored in environment variables
Respects source terms of service and robots.txt

development_state.notes: Fully operational dual-email system with separate tracking and scheduling

architecture.overview: Dual Pipeline: Config Selection → Fetcher → Tracker → Extractor → Summarizer → Selector → Composer → SQS Queue → SMTP Sender

config.description: Dual configuration system for different email types

fetcher.description: Fetch articles from RSS feeds and local search

tracker.description: Track sent articles and prevent duplicates per email type
tracker.implementation: JSON file-based cache with separate files

extractor.description: Extract clean article text from HTML

selector.description: Dedupe, score and select top items with source diversity

processor.description: Process SQS queue and send emails

current_capabilities: Automated dual daily email generation and delivery
Multi-source RSS feed processing (8 total sources across both emails)
Source diversity algorithm ensuring balanced content
Clean text extraction filtering code/JSON noise
Reliable email delivery via AWS SQS + SMTP
Separate duplicate prevention tracking for each email type
Multiple recipient support with individual delivery
